incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Agent Run (Seed 25)

**Summary:** The dungeon exploration mission failed to achieve any progress, reaching the turn limit of 50 turns (51 total) with a final progress score of 0.0. Agent B encountered spurious_block anomalies on seven separate occasions (turns 13, 16, 19, 24, 30, 31, 45, 48), while Agent A hit the same anomaly twice (turns 4, 26), suggesting the agents were repeatedly attempting movement into blocked or invalid spaces without adapting their pathfinding strategy. **Critical failure point:** Neither agent successfully obtained a key pickup or unlocked any doors, indicating they likely became stuck in geometric dead-ends or were unable to establish effective communication and coordination, as evidenced by zero messages sent and zero DM interactions. **Root cause analysis:** The high frequency of spurious_block anomalies suggests the dungeon layout may have had narrow corridors or the agents lacked sufficient pathfinding heuristics to avoid repetitive collision attempts; the turn exhaustion without progress indicates no learning or strategy pivot occurred across the 50-turn window.
